steps.title: Simplify the second equation
steps.content:
The second equation is $x + y + y = 155$. Combine like terms on the left side:
$$x + 2y = 155$$

steps.title: Subtract the first equation to eliminate x
steps.content:
Subtract the first equation from the simplified second equation:
$$(x + 2y) - (x + y) = 155 - 125$$
The $x$ terms cancel, leaving:
$$y = 30$$
